title: hi52 LIKIT RE-TEST under corrected cost -- D-205-REVISITED (ADIM-1): the EXACT D-205 hi52-liquid measurement, changing ONLY the cost input to the D-207-corrected quoted-primary model -- Stage 0 pre-registration
config_module: src/screening/d205_config.py (REUSED verbatim -- D-208 changes NO measurement geometry)
decision_owner: the project. Harness MEASURES + RECOMMENDS; does NOT finalize deployment. Even a TRADEABLE-EDGE verdict is hi52's first deployable Yol-1 FORM (an overlay CANDIDATE at most -- separate the project decision). Deployment is NEVER auto-triggered.
what_this_is: D-208 = D-205-REVISITED. It re-runs the D-205 hi52-liquid 5-gate test on the SAME frozen D-202 panel, SAME hi52 signal (D-203-identical), SAME liquid universe (trailing-63d-median ADV >= 1e7 TL), SAME EW_FULL_LIQUID benchmark, SAME 5 gates, SAME 2-way verdict rule and SAME deploy hurdle. The ONLY difference is the COST INPUT: the D-207-corrected realistic_cost (quoted-primary EOD spread -> 252d-Roll fallback -> re-scaled tier; FIX-1 half-spread doubled; FIX-3 re-tier) replaces the D-205 cost (then-inflated: 21d-Roll PRIMARY + the 2S double-count + the unreachable D-204 tiers).
why: NRR-010 diagnosed the shared transaction-cost model as inflated ~12-25x on liquid names; D-207 corrected it (FIDELITY passed: liquid megas 271-509bp -> 16-26bp round-trip; microcap impact stayed real). D-205 had declared hi52-liquid 'YINE-TRADEABLE-DEGIL' partly on the inflated cost (realized ~298bp >> breakeven ~138bp -> cost gate failed). With the corrected ~20bp cost, breakeven-138 >> 20 -> the cost gate can now PASS. D-208 measures, on a FAIR footing, whether hi52-liquid is tradeable once the inflated-cost confound is removed.
honest_expectation: Declared BEFORE results, no celebration. The cost gate (gate5: after-cost relative mean > 0) will LIKELY now PASS (D-205 breakeven grid: at a ~20bp flat cost the EW_FULL_LIQUID-relative mean is ~+0.66%/month, positive). BUT the STATISTICAL wall (gate2: NW |t| >= 2) probably STILL STANDS: the hi52-liquid COST-FREE relative edge was already only NW t=1.70 with a CI that INCLUDES zero (D-205 rel_liquid_costfree). A near-constant ~20bp cost barely changes the t, so the after-cost t likely remains < 2. The probable verdict is therefore 'not cost -- SIGNIFICANCE kills', but this time established by MEASUREMENT, not assumption. If gate2 unexpectedly passes, that is a genuine surprise and is reported openly. Either outcome is reported honestly.

relationship_to_d205_STRANGLER.rule: D-208 is a SEPARATE NEW record. The D-205 records -- docs/research/D-205-rapor.md, docs/yol1/STAGE0_d205.json, docs/yol1/d205_results.json -- are NOT touched. The D-205 verdict stays historically valid ('given under the then-inflated cost'). D-208 issues its OWN verdict (under corrected cost). Past evolution is never erased.

candidate_N_note.rule: hi52's N<=3 budget (D-203 KESIN + D-204 STRES + D-205 LIKIT-ONCE) is FULL. D-208 is NOT a 4th N-round. It is a COST-PREMISE-CHANGED re-test: NRR-010/D-207 produced NEW INFORMATION (the cost model the D-205 verdict relied on was inflated and has been corrected), which legitimately warrants re-measuring the SAME candidate on a fair footing. No signal redefinition, no threshold re-pick, no universe change -- only the corrected cost is applied. This is a revisited, not a new candidate.

the_only_difference_FROZEN.d205_cost_inflated: Roll PRIMARY at 21d window; round_trip = 2*(full_S + impact) (the 2S double-count); D-204 tier ladder (MEGA>=2e9 TL unreachable). Realized ~298bp flat-bps-equiv; breakeven ~138bp -> cost gate FAILED.
the_only_difference_FROZEN.d208_cost_corrected_D207: Spread source hierarchy EOD-quoted (observed, vol-robust) -> 252d-Roll fallback -> re-scaled D207 tier floor. round_trip = 2*(half_spread + impact) (FIX-1). Re-scaled tiers from observed quoted medians (FIX-3). Quoted panel built locally from the archive and INJECTED (CI-safe; never built in CI).
the_only_difference_FROZEN.kyle_impact_UNCHANGED: lambda_kyle=1.0, sigma window 21d -- FROZEN, identical to D-205. Only the SPREAD leg + tier floor changed (D-207 scope). Microcap impact is REAL and unchanged.
the_only_difference_FROZEN.everything_else_IDENTICAL: hi52 signal (close/rolling-252d-max), liquid universe (ADV>=1e7, trailing 63), EW_FULL_LIQUID benchmark, top-15, monthly rebalance, the 5 gates, NW lags=3, null seed 12345 / 2000 resamples, the deploy hurdle 0.000222 and its drift guard, the frozen D-202 panel content hashes.

liquid_universe_FROZEN_REUSE_D205.definition: Liquid universe at date d = names whose trailing-63d-median daily traded value (value_tl) >= 1e7 TL. UNCHANGED from D-205.

benchmark_FROZEN_REUSE_D205.primary: EW_FULL_LIQUID = equal-weight of the LIQUID universe per period.
benchmark_FROZEN_REUSE_D205.context: EW_FULL = equal-weight of the entire clean universe.

five_gates_FROZEN_REUSE_D205.gate1_selection_null: Cost-free REAL top-15 vs a fair null drawing random-15 from the SAME liquid pool each period; PASS if the strategy real-mean beats the >=95th percentile of the null. COST-FREE -> identical to D-205 (NOT affected by the cost change).
five_gates_FROZEN_REUSE_D205.gate2_newey_west_aftercost: NW |t| (lags=3) of the AFTER-COST EW_FULL_LIQUID-relative series >= 2.0 (D205_GATE_NW_T_MIN). Computed on the CORRECTED-cost series.
five_gates_FROZEN_REUSE_D205.gate3_cross_regime_aftercost: regime_split at 2022-01-01 on the AFTER-COST (corrected) series -> both sub-periods relative-positive.
five_gates_FROZEN_REUSE_D205.gate4_subtier_consistency: Within-liquid upper/lower ADV-half (split 0.5); both halves relative-positive AFTER corrected cost; lower-half SAMPLE SIZE reported (the maintainer note).

cost_geometry_CORRECTED_D207.model: Per-stock round-trip = 2*(one-way HALF-spread + Kyle one-way impact) + commission(0). Spread source per (date,name): EOD quoted half-spread (observed) -> 252d-Roll/2 fallback -> re-scaled D207 tier half-spread. The corrected src/screening/realistic_cost.py + d204_hi52_stress.per_stock_cost_panel (post-D-207) is REUSED as-is; the quoted panel is injected via run_d205's quoted_panel parameter.
cost_geometry_CORRECTED_D207.quoted_panel: Built locally by src/screening/quoted_spread.load_or_build_quoted_panel over the liquid-union symbols, window=D207_QUOTED_WINDOW(63), min_coverage=D207_QUOTED_MIN_COVERAGE(21), span 2019-07-01..2026-04-30. INJECTED parameter (archive never enters CI).
cost_geometry_CORRECTED_D207.note: lambda_kyle / order_value / hurdle / windows are FROZEN at the D-205 values; calibration = optimization = FORBIDDEN. The cost CHANGE is purely the D-207 correction, NOT a re-tune.

deploy_hurdle_FROZEN_REUSE_D205.rule: The liquid-long after-cost REAL monthly net must clear the mean monthly REAL TLREF deposit/repo carry. The engine RECOMPUTES from the frozen TLREF+TUFE snapshots and ASSERTS |recomputed-0.000222| <= 5e-6 (drift guard), else RAISES. UNCHANGED.

verdict_rule_FROZEN_2way_REUSE_D205.engine: Reuses d205_hi52_liquid.d205_verdict VERBATIM (no new thresholds, no re-pick).
verdict_rule_FROZEN_2way_REUSE_D205.TRADEABLE_EDGE: ALL 5 gates PASS AND liquid-long after-cost REAL net >= the TLREF deposit hurdle AND breakeven >= 2x the CORRECTED realized cost AND pool_size_min >= 15 -> hi52's FIRST deployable Yol-1 FORM (overlay CANDIDATE; deploy is a separate the project decision, NOT auto-triggered).
verdict_rule_FROZEN_2way_REUSE_D205.TRADEABLE_DEGIL_significance: If gate5 (after-cost mean) is now POSITIVE (cost gate passes) BUT gate2 (NW |t| >= 2) FAILS (or any other gate fails) -> hi52-liquid 'not cost, SIGNIFICANCE kills' is now DEFINITE on a fair footing: the inflated-cost excuse is removed, the signal is simply too thin to be statistically tradeable. Clean closure.
verdict_rule_FROZEN_2way_REUSE_D205.oos_gap_MANDATORY: Every verdict (both branches) attaches the explicit OOS-gap statement: 2019-26 is one long high-inflation regime; a true inflation-normalization OOS is ABSENT; the walk-forward is in-sample and the 2024-26 disinflation window is only a weak proxy. Regime-change robustness is NOT proven.
verdict_rule_FROZEN_2way_REUSE_D205.no_post_hoc_relaxation: No threshold, safety-multiple, gate, signal, or universe is loosened. The ONLY change vs D-205 is swapping the inflated cost for the D-207-corrected cost.

thresholds_reference.decision_constants: src/signals/thresholds.py D205_* block (reused) + D207_* block (corrected cost / quoted-spread / re-tier constants).

price.source: D-202 (reused from D-203/204/205); engine asserts the hash matches

quoted_spread_archive.note: EOD best bid/ask source for the quoted panel; LOCAL only, NOT in CI

outputs: docs/yol1/d208_results.json (after run: corrected-cost 3-numbers [EW_FULL_LIQUID-relative mean, NW-t, breakeven vs corrected realized cost] + 5 gates + verdict + an inflated-vs-corrected comparison block referencing d205_results.json)
docs/research/D-208-rapor.md (D-205-revisited verdict; corrected-cost numbers; gate2 t; inflated-vs-corrected table; OOS-gap explicit) + docs/RESEARCH_REGISTRY.md line
